generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us - it's about protecting our families from those who exploit our openness. Experts warn: without stronger domestic production, we're one supply chain crisis away from chaos. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
